footer.description: Cybersecurity SaaS suite to detect, analyze and fix critical vulnerabilities in real time.

home.subtitle: A cybersecurity SaaS suite to detect, analyze and fix critical vulnerabilities in real time.
home.featuresSub: Designed for CTOs, CISOs and DevSecOps teams
home.highlight1Body: Automatic scanning of your internal and external attack surfaces.
home.highlight2Body: Risk ranking based on real impact and business context.
home.highlight3Body: Aligned with ISO 27001, SOC2, GDPR and industry best practices.
home.testimonial1Quote: SecureOps helped us reduce our attack surface by 40% in 3 months.
home.testimonial2Quote: A clear, action-oriented tool, perfectly suited for tech teams.
home.testimonial3Quote: Vulnerability prioritization is a game changer.
home.ctaSub: Deploy SecureOps in less than 10 minutes. No credit card required.

pricing.title: Try for free & no commitment
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your team size.
pricing.faq1Question: Can I change my plan at any time?
pricing.faq1Answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. The change takes effect immediately and your billing is prorated.
pricing.faq2Answer: No, all our plans are commitment-free. You can cancel at any time from your My Account page.
pricing.faq3Question: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq3Answer: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) and SEPA transfers for annual plans.

subscription.title: Subscription & billing
subscription.freeDesc: You are currently using basic features. Advanced features are available with the premium subscription.
subscription.premiumDesc: You have access to all premium features.
subscription.stripeInfo: For added security, billing is managed by Stripe, a trusted payment provider. SecureOps never stores your card information: they are processed directly via a secure payment interface.

privacy.title: Data & privacy
privacy.downloadDesc: Export all your personal data in TXT format.
privacy.favoritesDesc: Delete all your search favorites. This action is irreversible.
privacy.deleteAccountDesc: Deleting your account is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.
privacy.deleteFavoritesModalMessage: Are you sure you want to delete all your favorites? This action is irreversible and all your search favorites will be permanently deleted.
privacy.deleteAccountModalMessage: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: Personal Data Protection — Last updated: February 2026
privacyPage.intro: SecureOps ("SecureOps", "we") places the highest importance on the protection of personal data and the respect of its users' privacy. This Privacy Policy informs you about how your data is collected, used, protected, shared and the rights you have, in accordance with:
introItems: French Data Protection Act No. 78-17 as amended
privacyPage.section1Text3: For any question or to exercise your rights: contact us by email or via the
privacyPage.section2Intro: We only collect data strictly necessary for the purposes described below.
privacyPage.section2_1aText: This data is used solely to process your request.
privacyPage.section2_1bText: You can unsubscribe at any time via the unsubscribe link in each email.
privacyPage.section2_2Intro: When browsing the site, we anonymously collect certain technical logs to improve our service and understand its usage:
section2_2Items: Tab visibility (whether the page is active or in the background)
privacyPage.section2_2TextEnd: : we do not store any IP addresses and do not perform any analytical, advertising or behavioral tracking that could personally identify you.
section3PurposeItems: Responding to messages sent via the contact form
privacyPage.section4_1Text: Data accessible only by authorized SecureOps personnel.
privacyPage.section4_2Text: Each subcontractor is bound by a GDPR-compliant contract guaranteeing an adequate level of security.
section5Items: Contact form: 12 months after the last exchange
Newsletter: until unsubscription, immediate deletion after unsubscription
User account: account lifetime + 12 months after deletion
Non-IP technical logs: 0 to 24 hours, no archiving
privacyPage.section6Intro: We implement technical and organizational measures, including:
section6Items: Secure hosting within the European Union
section7Items: Right of access: obtain a copy of your personal data
Right of rectification: correct inaccurate data
Right to erasure: request deletion of your data
Right to restriction: limit the processing of your data
Right to portability: receive your data in a usable format
Right to object: object to the processing of your data
privacyPage.section7TextEnd: — Subject: GDPR Request. Complaint possible with the CNIL.
privacyPage.section8CurrentText: : no tracking, statistics, advertising or profiling cookies. Only technical cookies may be used for service operation (authentication, session).
privacyPage.section8FutureText: (audience measurement, personalization, advertising): a CNIL-compliant cookie banner will be deployed before activation.
privacyPage.section9Text1: No transfer outside the EU at this time.
privacyPage.section9Text2: In case of future transfer (e.g. US providers), we will apply:
privacyPage.section10Intro: SecureOps may modify this policy to account for:
privacyPage.section10Text: In case of major changes, users will be informed.
privacyPage.section11Text: For any question or request regarding your data, go to the
privacyPage.section11TextEnd: and select GDPR Request as the subject.

metadata.homeDescription: Discover SecureOps: detect, analyze and fix critical vulnerabilities in real time. Request a demo or view our pricing.
